decision: Align unchecked math seams around replaceable policies
reason: The scoped OCP work is best handled by extracting outcome/probability/valuation rules into small strategy tables and helpers while preserving the existing public function signatures.
impact: Scoped math packages remain behaviorally stable but are now open to extension without editing the central branching functions.

decision: use package-local policy registries instead of direct YES/NO branching in scoped math files
reason: The unchecked math files shared the same OCP gap: outcome-specific behavior was hard-coded in exported functions. Small package-local registries and helper builders preserve behavior while allowing extension without editing each call site.
impact: Scoped math packages now extend through local rules/providers instead of repeated conditionals.
